The AI agent that creates complete on-brand campaigns from just a prompt. Welcome to your vibe marketing era.

Explore Marketing Agent
Customer Agent

Your data, intelligence, and AI agents working as one

Explore the app marketplace

Frequently asked questions
What is Klaviyo?
Klaviyo is the
autonomous B2C CRM
and
AI marketing platform
that unifies customer data and automates email, SMS, RCS, WhatsApp, and mobile push to drive personalized, revenue-generating campaigns. Built as both a system of record and system of action, Klaviyo combines a customer data platform, real-time signals, and AI agents to power automated insights and one-click execution.
How much does Klaviyo cost? Is there a free plan?
Yes. Klaviyo offers a
free plan with core features
, and paid plans scale based on the number of contacts and channel usage (such as email and SMS). Enterprise pricing is also available for large organizations with advanced needs.
What integrations does Klaviyo offer?
Klaviyo offers native integrations with ecommerce platforms like
Shopify
, plus connectors for payment providers, CRMs, analytics tools, and messaging platforms. We also integrate with your favorite AI tools with our Klaviyo ChatGPT app, Klaviyo Claude Connector, and Klaviyo MCP for building agentic workflows. These integrations sync customer, product, and order data in real time to power personalized marketing and automation.
What channels does Klaviyo support?
Klaviyo unifies
email
,
SMS
/ Text, RCS, mobile push,
WhatsApp
and web events into a single customer profile so you can run consistent, data-driven
omnichannel marketing
.
That unified CDP + real-time signals power cross-channel flows, predictive analytics, and agent decisions to deliver more relevant messages where customers prefer to engage.
How does Klaviyo support enterprise brands?
For
enterprise brands
, Klaviyo is the unified B2C CRM built to replace fragmented legacy stacks — consolidating data, execution, and analytics into one secure, scalable platform. Unlike rigid suites that require constant developer intervention and data syncing, Klaviyo gives marketing teams the autonomy to launch sophisticated omnichannel campaigns across email, SMS, push, WhatsApp, and web in days, not months.
Built on a flexible data foundation with unified customer profiles, 350+ native integrations, and full developer tooling (APIs, webhooks, SDKs, warehouse syncs), Klaviyo deploys rapidly — with enterprise-grade security, audit-ready compliance, dedicated CSMs, and peak-season uptime backed by SLAs.

Frequently asked questions
What is included in the Klaviyo free plan?
The free plan allows you to create a Klaviyo account, import or sync your contacts and activity data, use the drag-and-drop email / SMS editors, and build automations, segmentation, and reports. On this tier you are limited to up to 250 active profiles (contacts who may receive marketing emails) and 500 email sends per month. Additionally, the free tier includes 150 mobile messaging credits per month (region/carrier dependent).
Is Klaviyo's free plan really free?
Yes — the free plan is available at no monthly cost as long as your account remains under the limits of 250 active profiles and 500 monthly email sends. However if you exceed those limits (or require paid-plan features such as custom branding removal or advanced support) you will need to upgrade or your sending may be paused.
How long can I stay on the free plan?
You may remain on the free plan indefinitely as long as your active profile count remains at or below the 250-profile limit and your monthly sends stay at or below 500 emails. Once you exceed either threshold, your ability to send may be restricted. Note: With the free plan you receive full email support only for the first 60 days; after that you still have access to the Help Center, community resources, and training but not full support channels reserved for paid tiers.
Who is the Klaviyo free plan best for?
The free plan is best suited for small businesses, start-ups, or brands just getting started with marketing automation who have relatively small contact lists (≤250 active profiles) and moderate sending needs (≤500 emails/month). It allows you to test Klaviyo's platform, integrate your data, run automations, and experiment with segmentation and SMS (via credits) without paying upfront. As your audience, sends or sophistication grow, you'll likely need to transition to a paid tier.
Can I use Klaviyo free plan for both email and SMS marketing?
Yes — the free plan supports both email marketing and text (SMS/MMS) marketing to a degree. On the free plan you are allotted 150 mobile messaging credits per month, so you can test mobile messaging campaigns.
Does the free plan include SMS or text message marketing?
Yes — the free plan includes 150 mobile messaging credits per month, enabling you to send mobile messages in addition to email.
What integrations are available on the free plan?
The free plan supports the standard library of integrations (for example ecommerce platforms, CRMs, web forms, data sources) that Klaviyo offers. You are not blocked from connecting your tech stack just because you're on the free tier. Many third-party reviewers note that Klaviyo's core integrations are included.
What happens when I exceed the free plan limits?
Once you exceed the free plan's limits (e.g., more than 250 active profiles or more than 500 email sends in a month), your account will no longer be able to send additional emails or messages until the next billing cycle or until you upgrade to a paid plan. You'll be prompted to upgrade to continue sending.
Does the free plan include customer support?
Yes, but with limitations: free plan users receive email support for the first 60 days after sign-up. After that, you'll have access to the Klaviyo Community and self-service resources (Help Center, Academy) rather than full support channels reserved for paid tiers.
Is Klaviyo free plan good for ecommerce stores on Shopify, Wix, or WooCommerce?
Yes — the free plan can absolutely work for ecommerce stores (on Shopify, WooCommerce, Wix etc) that are just starting out, testing email + SMS, or sending to smaller audiences. Because Klaviyo supports integrations with major ecommerce platforms and gives you access to segmentation and automation even on free, it's a useful entry point. As your store and list grow (beyond the 250 contact limit or high-volume sends), you'll want to move to a paid tier.
How do I upgrade from Klaviyo free to a paid plan?
Upgrading from the free plan is straightforward: in your Klaviyo account head to Account Settings → Billing (or Change Plan), review your active profile count and required sends, select the paid tier that matches your needs, and complete the upgrade. Once upgraded, your account unlocks paid-plan features (no send or profile limits on that tier), plus enhanced support, branding removal, etc.

analysis.name: Klaviyo
analysis.value_proposition: AI-powered marketing, service, and CRM platform that unifies email, SMS, and customer data so B2C brands can grow relationships and revenue autonomously.
analysis.ideal_customer: E-commerce and retail brands (especially Shopify merchants) wanting unified email/SMS automation with deep customer data and AI agents

features.name: email marketing
features.description: Full-featured email campaign creation, sending, and automation

features.name: sms marketing
features.description: SMS campaign and automation sending with mobile message credits

features.name: rcs for business
features.description: Rich Communication Services messaging channel for mobile campaigns

features.name: mobile app marketing / push notifications
features.description: In-app and push notification marketing for mobile apps

features.name: whatsapp marketing
features.description: WhatsApp channel for marketing messages and customer communications

features.name: social marketing
features.description: Turns social comments, DMs, and mentions into usable customer data and campaign segments
features.evidence_quote: Klaviyo Social Marketing helps you turn comments, DMs, and mentions into customer data

features.name: composer
features.description: AI agent (Beta) that creates complete on-brand campaigns from a single text prompt
features.evidence_quote: The AI agent that creates complete on-brand campaigns from just a prompt.

features.name: marketing agent
features.description: AI agent that learns from your website URL and auto-builds campaigns, flows, and sign-up forms

features.name: customer agent
features.description: AI customer support agent that resolves questions autonomously and upsells/recommends products
features.evidence_quote: Customer Agent resolves 65% of questions autonomously. And because it has the full customer picture, it also recommends and converts

features.name: customer hub
features.description: Self-service customer portal for shoppers to manage orders and account details

features.name: helpdesk
features.description: Built-in helpdesk for managing customer service tickets and conversations

features.name: marketing analytics
features.description: Campaign performance reporting and revenue attribution analytics

features.name: advanced klaviyo data platform (kdp)
features.description: Enterprise-grade data infrastructure for large-scale customer data management and advanced analytics

features.name: segmentation
features.description: Customer segmentation based on behavior, profile data, purchase history, and predictive analytics

features.name: reviews
features.description: Product review collection and management tool native to the platform

features.name: email templates
features.description: Pre-built and customizable email templates with drag-and-drop visual editor
features.evidence_quote: Basic email templates and drag-and-drop editor

features.name: flows (automated workflows)
features.description: Automated triggered email/SMS sequences based on customer actions and lifecycle events

features.name: campaigns
features.description: One-time broadcast email and SMS campaigns sent to lists or segments

features.name: sign-up forms
features.description: Customizable pop-up and embedded forms for list and profile building

features.name: deliverability & compliance tools
features.description: Email deliverability monitoring, sender reputation tools, and compliance management

features.name: audience management
features.description: Contact and profile management, list organization, suppression, and audience building

features.name: b2c crm
features.description: Full customer relationship management platform with unified profiles built for B2C brands
features.evidence_quote: The B2C CRM — Discover how the Klaviyo CRM, built for your business, can help you create lasting customer relationships

features.name: ai subject line generator
features.description: AI-powered tool for generating optimized email subject lines

features.name: drag-and-drop email editor
features.description: Visual no-code drag-and-drop editor for building email designs
features.evidence_quote: Basic email templates and drag-and-drop editor

features.name: conversations
features.description: Unified inbox for managing customer conversations across channels

features.name: app marketplace
features.description: Curated marketplace of 350+ third-party app integrations
features.evidence_quote: Integrate with 350+ apps to seamlessly connect all of your data to Klaviyo

features.name: api access
features.description: REST API with versioning, rate limiting, and full reference documentation
features.evidence_quote: API reference — Browse our full catalog of API docs.

features.name: developer tools
features.description: Sample data generation, API usage monitoring, and Postman collections for developers
features.evidence_quote: Generate sample data, monitor your API usage, and access our Postman collections.

features.name: built-in reporting
features.description: Pre-built dashboards and reports for marketing performance at no extra cost

features.name: klaviyo ai (k:ai)
features.description: Overarching AI layer powering agents, predictions, personalization, and recommendations across the platform

features.name: professional services
features.description: Paid onboarding, implementation, and strategic support packages

features.name: sso (single sign-on)
features.description: SSO login support for enterprise teams

features.name: klaviyo academy
features.description: Structured learning platform with courses, certifications, live trainings, and office hours
features.evidence_quote: Expert training and education to help you succeed with Klaviyo, and beyond.

features.name: partner directory
features.description: Directory of certified agency and technology partners for hire
features.evidence_quote: Partner directory — Explore partners to work with

features.name: omnichannel marketing
features.description: Unified cross-channel marketing across email, SMS, push, WhatsApp, social, and RCS from one platform
features.evidence_quote: Omnichannel marketing — AI, data, and channels working as one

differentiators: Positions as 'autonomous B2C CRM' — full customer lifecycle, not just email
Marketing Agent builds campaigns from just a URL in minutes
Customer Agent resolves 65% of support questions autonomously while driving revenue
Unified data + AI + channels (email, SMS, WhatsApp, push, social, RCS) in one platform
Shopify $100M strategic investment — deep native Shopify integration
Modular pricing: buy only the products you need (marketing, analytics, service)

recent_ships.what: Composer (Beta) — AI agent that generates complete on-brand campaigns from a single prompt
recent_ships.source: Meet Composer — The AI agent that creates complete on-brand campaigns from just a prompt.

recent_ships.what: Marketing Agent — auto-builds campaigns, flows, and forms from your website URL
recent_ships.source: Start fast, launch faster with just your URL. In minutes, Marketing Agent learns from your website

recent_ships.what: Customer Agent — AI support agent that resolves and converts
recent_ships.source: Customer Agent resolves 65% of questions autonomously.
RCS for Business (listed under CHANNELS in navigation)

recent_ships.what: Social Marketing — DMs, comments, and mentions as customer data
recent_ships.source: Klaviyo Social Marketing helps you turn comments, DMs, and mentions into customer data you can use

praised: Deep Shopify integration (inferred from $100M Shopify strategic investment and primary ecommerce positioning)
Powerful segmentation and automated flow capabilities (inferred from platform emphasis and community traction)

tiers.name: Free
tiers.headline_inclusions: 250 profiles, 500 emails/mo, 150 SMS credits, Customer Hub, reporting, AI subject line, Marketing Agent

tiers.name: Marketing
tiers.headline_inclusions: Scales email sends and SMS credits beyond free limits; full campaign, flow, and automation features

tiers.name: Data + Analytics
tiers.headline_inclusions: Advanced Klaviyo Data Platform and Marketing Analytics add-on

tiers.name: Service
tiers.headline_inclusions: Customer Hub, Customer Agent, Helpdesk; currently 30% off

tiers.name: Professional Services
tiers.headline_inclusions: Enterprise onboarding, implementation, and strategic support packages

pricing.notes: Modular pricing model — Marketing, Data+Analytics, and Service are separate purchasable products that combine into a total. Pricing scales with profile/contact count (usage-based), not seats. Actual per-profile tier prices not captured in source. Service tier currently 30% off. Free plan is permanent, not a trial.
